text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A little. I'm not worried, though.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I just want to run as I please...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And to make certain that it's the right thing to do.
